name: Apple Crumb Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Grease a 13x9-inch baking pan.
3. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients EXCEPT applesauce and nuts. Mix until crumbly.
4. Reserve 1 cup of the mixture.
5. Press the remaining mixture onto the bottom of the prepared pan.
6. Bake for 15 minutes.
7. Spread the applesauce over the partially baked crust.
8. Sprinkle with nuts.
9. Top with the reserved 1 cup oat mixture.
10. Bake for an additional 13 to 15 minutes, or until golden brown.
11. Cool on a wire rack; cut into 2-inch squares.
12. Makes about 2 dozen bars.
